channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Family demands an independent probe after ICE officer fatally shoots a man in Houston
item.description: The son of a Mexican national fatally shot by an Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer in Houston says he was a hardworking father who had been working toward a work permit after 35 years in the U.S.

item.title: Evacuated residents and hotel guests are allowed to return amid work on damaged NYC high-rise
DNA evidence from Charlie Kirk assassination disputed by defendant’s lawyers
